title: Shivanasamudra Falls
tagline: Shivanasamudra Falls — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: Shivanasamudra Falls is a series of segmented waterfalls on the Kaveri river.
overview.description: Shivanasamudra Falls is a series of segmented waterfalls on the Kaveri river. It is situated in Malavalli taluk in Mandya district, Karnataka. It consists of two series of drops, named Gagana Chukki and Bhara Chukki. The waterfalls has a vertical drop of 91 m (299 ft) and swells to 300 m (980 ft) in width during the monsoon season.

topPlaces.name: Ranganathaswamy Temple, Shivanasamudra
topPlaces.description: The Sri Ranganthaswamy temple in Shivanasamudra, Kollegala taluk, Chamarajanagara district, Karnataka, India is a temple dedicated to the Hindu God Ranganatha, a manifestation of Vishnu. While there are numerous Ranganatha temples in South India, and many of those are located along the banks of river Cauvery, there are three temples within the islands that are formed within the river itself.

topPlaces.name: Halaguru

topPlaces.name: Belakavadi
topPlaces.description: Belakavadi or Belakawadi is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Malavalli taluk of Mandya district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Shimsha
topPlaces.description: Shimsha is a river that flows in the state of Karnataka, India. It is one of the tributaries of the river Kaveri, which is one of the major rivers of South India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shivanasamudra Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shivanasamudra Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shivanasamudra Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shivanasamudra Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shivanasamudra Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shivanasamudra Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Shivanasamudra Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shivanasamudra Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ranganathaswamy Temple, Shivanasamudra, Halaguru, Belakavadi, Shimsha.
